benefits.description: CJC/IPA combination has been used for quite a while with great results

side_effects.description: Whole body turned very red, especially arms, neck and face
Throat swelled a little, breathing became more forced, felt like breathing in full manual mode

protocol_notes: Injected 5 units (100mcg CJC + 100mcg IPA) subcutaneously with 30G 1/2" needle in belly a few inches off navel. Hit a small blood vessel during injection causing accidental intravenous administration. Body turned red within 5-7 seconds. Treated with cold water-soaked towel on neck, ice cold water, and 24hr allergy medication. Back to normal within 1-2 hours. This was an extremely rare incident caused by hitting a vein and causing an exaggerated histamine response. User has aspirated subsequent doses for peace of mind.
